); } const FEATURES = [ { title: "AI Resume Builder", desc: "Generate tailored, ATS-friendly resumes in seconds.", icon: "✨" }, { title: "Cover Letter Generator", desc: "Turn your bullets + JD into a crisp letter.", icon: "📝" }, { title: "Keyword Match", desc: "Surface missing keywords and boost relevance.", icon: "🎯" }, { title: "One-Click Autofill", desc: "Auto-fill repetitive forms using your profile.", icon: "⚡" }, { title: "Tracker & Reminders", desc: "Stay organized with statuses and due dates.", icon: "📌" }, { title: "Export PDF/Docx", desc: "Download clean, consistent outputs instantly.", icon: "⬇️" }, ]; const STEPS = [ { title: "Paste job description", desc: "We extract requirements and keywords automatically." }, { title: "Add your wins", desc: "Share achievements; we quantify impact." }, { title: "Generate & tweak", desc: "Refine with inline AI edits until it fits." }, { title: "Apply & track", desc: "Export, auto-fill, and track in one place." }, ]; const FAQS = [ { q: "Is it ATS-friendly?", a: "Yes. We structure content for common parsers and highlight missing keywords." }, { q: "Can I export?", a: "PDF and Docx exports are supported with consistent formatting." }, { q: "Is my data safe?", a: "We store securely, encrypt at rest, and never sell your data." }, { q: "Does it work for any role?", a: "Yes — we tailor to your job description and background." }, ];
